description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:14 Docker image for both build and test stages. Define a cache keyed by ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} that stores .npm/ and node_modules/ and includes untracked files. In the build stage add a build job that runs node --version, npm --version, then npm ci --cache .npm --prefer-offline, and is tagged with docker and shared. In the test stage add a test job that runs npm test, also using node:14 and the same docker and shared tags, with no services, artifacts, or special rules.
